creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
Hello,

devel/protobuf-c fails to build in poudriere-devel (in this instance, bind-tools depends on it)

Full log available here : http://void.f-m.fm.user.fm/bugs/protobuf-c-1.4.1_6.log (158k)
